dataRoles.name: category
dataRoles.description: Optional. Bind one or more business dimensions so the assistant can explain answers in the context of selected categories or filtered report slices.

dataRoles.name: measure
dataRoles.description: Optional. Bind one or more measures so the assistant can summarize totals, compare selected values, and ground answers in visible metrics.

dataRoles.name: userRole
dataRoles.description: Optional. Bind a DAX measure that returns the viewer's role (e.g. LOOKUPVALUE on USERPRINCIPALNAME). Overrides the format-pane User Mode when bound.

dataRoles.name: userIdentity
dataRoles.description: Optional but recommended for chat history. Bind a DAX measure such as USERPRINCIPALNAME() so the proxy can store and retrieve only the current viewer's history unless the role is author/admin.

host.description: Required. The full Databricks workspace URL. Used for direct, proxy, and gateway connections.

apiBaseUrl.description: Set this when using a proxy, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8787. Leave blank for direct or gateway mode.

assistantProfile.description: Proxy mode only. Selects a named connection profile from the proxy's config.json. Leave blank to use the default profile. Only needed when the proxy serves multiple workspaces or Genie spaces.

token.description: Databricks Genie Direct and Databricks AI Gateway modes only. A Databricks Personal Access Token for browser-to-Databricks calls. Leave blank when the proxy handles authentication.

spaceId.description: Databricks Genie Direct and Databricks AI Gateway modes only. The Genie Space identifier for this report. In proxy mode the profile provides this automatically.

warehouseId.description: Direct mode only. When provided, the visual auto-starts a stopped SQL warehouse before asking Genie, avoiding long 'waiting for compute' pauses.

proxyKey.description: Proxy mode only. Shared secret sent as the X-Genie-Key header to a proxy that requires authentication. Leave blank for local/dev proxies.

genieFields.description: Comma or line-separated field names from your Genie metric view. Used to validate that Power BI fields match the Genie space schema.

domainGuidance.description: Short report-specific instructions sent to Genie on the first turn of each session (business rules, KPIs, formatting). Cap ~8,000 characters (~3 pages). For longer guidance use the Genie Space's General Instructions in Databricks — it persists, is filtered per question, and does not cost tokens per turn.

sendContextToGenie.description: When turned off, only the typed question and Genie instructions are sent to Genie. Power BI dimensions, measures, and filter values stay inside the report.

darkMode.description: Switch between dark and light presentation for report readability.

showSql.description: Display the SQL query that Genie generated for each answer. Useful for analyst or developer review.

showTrace.description: Surface routing and orchestration trace details when available.

showGuidedFilters.description: Display guided filter selectors below the chat area. Intended for report authors who need to scope queries by region, time, or segment.

allowReportActions.description: Allow guided selectors inside the visual to apply Power BI filters to the surrounding report.

devMode.description: Shows the diagnostics panel with setup guidance, context preview, and orchestration details for testing and troubleshooting.

insightsPrompt.description: Power-user escape hatch — sent verbatim to AI as a single call. For most use cases, prefer Domain + Custom Sections (auto-adapts to bound dataset).

insightsDomain.description: Short label naming the analytics domain so the AI uses the right vocabulary. Examples: Sales Performance, Supply Chain Operations, Hospital Operations.

insightsCustomSections.description: JSON array of {name, instruction} entries. Each becomes a domain-specific section between TRENDS and RISKS in the auto-built pipeline.

insightsAuthoringMode.description: Drives which authoring path the AI Insights pipeline takes — manual (verbatim prompt) / preset (domain + sections) / ai-assisted (auto-detect).

insightsDomainGuidance.description: Insights-only override of the shared 'Business guidance'. When non-empty, used in place of `domainGuidance` for AI Insights stage prompts. Empty falls back to `domainGuidance`. Lets supervisor pages keep Chat-flow guidance shared while pinning Insights-flow guidance separately.

metricDirectionRules.description: Free-text rules describing inverted-good metrics and color thresholds for AI Insights. Used by the model to emit 🟢 / 🟡 / 🔴 status emoji in pipe-table cells. Example: 'Return Rate: lower is better — 🟢 ≤2% 🟡 2-5% 🔴 >5%. Margin %: 🟢 ≥15% 🟡 8-15% 🔴 <8%.'

insightsMetricDirections.description: JSON array of {name, higherIsBetter, aliases?, redPct?, amberPct?}. Used by the renderer to color Insights KPI tiles and table cells deterministically.

insightsShowProvenanceFooter.description: Show a compact AI-generated source/timestamp footer on each Insights section.

insightsShowHeadline.description: When OFF, the AI Insights pipeline skips the HEADLINE + KPI SNAPSHOT stage. Edit from the Setup tab.

insightsShowTrends.description: When OFF, the AI Insights pipeline skips the TRENDS stage. Edit from the Setup tab.

insightsShowRisks.description: When OFF, the AI Insights pipeline skips the RISKS stage. Edit from the Setup tab.

insightsShowActions.description: When OFF, the AI Insights pipeline skips the RECOMMENDED ACTIONS stage. Edit from the Setup tab.

insightsHeadlineOverride.description: Optional override for the HEADLINE+KPI stage instruction. Empty = use built-in default.

insightsTrendsOverride.description: Optional override for the TRENDS stage instruction. Empty = use built-in default.

insightsRisksOverride.description: Optional override for the RISKS stage instruction. Empty = use built-in default.

insightsActionsOverride.description: Optional override for the RECOMMENDED ACTIONS stage instruction. Empty = use built-in default.

refreshInsights.description: Manual refresh trigger for AI Insights. Flip the value after changing settings to re-run the Insights pipeline.

insightsCacheTtlMinutes.description: Minutes the AI Insights run is cached so PBI page-switches don't re-trigger Genie. 0 disables caching.

insightsValidationRetryCount.description: Number of times to auto-retry an AI Insights stage when its output doesn't match the format contract. Default 1 = single retry. Raise for higher reliability at the cost of latency on failed stages. 0 disables auto-retry; the inline banner + manual retry still work.

showConnectorCompatibilityWarnings.description: When ON, surfaces warnings when settings are configured for one connector but the active backend doesn't support them (e.g., Custom SQL sections require Databricks Genie). Default OFF.

enabledFeatures.description: Which user-facing tabs the visual exposes. Both: AI Insights + Chat (default). AI Insights only: auto analytics, no Chat tab. Chat only: conversational Q&A, no auto-insights. Edited from the Setup tab Section 0.

enumeration.displayName: AI Insights only — no Chat tab

genieTextInstructionsJson.description: JSON-stringified array of {id, content[]} entries pushed to the upstream Genie space. Edited via Setup tab Section G.1.

genieSampleQuestionsJson.description: JSON-stringified array of {id, question[]} entries. Edited via Setup tab Section G.2.

genieExampleSqlsJson.description: JSON-stringified array of trusted SQL example entries. Edited via Setup tab Section G.3.

lastSpaceSyncAt.description: Timestamp of the last write-through to the upstream Genie space. 0 = never written.

wizardDismissed.description: True once the author skipped the first-time setup wizard. Wave 32 — additive flag; defaults to false.

ucRowFiltersEnforced.description: Declare that Unity Catalog row filter functions are applied to the tables Genie reads (typically keyed on current_user()). Updates the header security badge and adds a governance hint to every Genie prompt. Does not enforce anything on its own.

ucColumnMasksEnforced.description: Declare that Unity Catalog column masks redact or hide restricted columns for non-privileged users. Updates the header security badge and adds a governance hint to every Genie prompt. Does not enforce anything on its own.

runtimeForbiddenColumns.description: Comma-separated column names the AI must never query or expose. Injected as a mandatory instruction into every Genie prompt.

runtimeMandatoryRowFilter.description: SQL WHERE clause fragment the AI must always apply. Injected as a mandatory instruction into every Genie prompt.

runtimeReadOnlyEnforced.description: When ON, the AI is instructed to use SELECT only. Responses containing DML (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/CREATE/ALTER/TRUNCATE) show a warning banner.

setupAccessAllowedUsers.description: Wave 38 Phase 1. Comma-separated emails / UPNs / role labels. When non-empty, the Setup tab is visible ONLY to viewers whose bound User Role measure matches one of these entries. Leave blank to fall back to the setupAccessEnabled toggle. UX gate only — not an authorization gate.

sqlCtePreamble.description: Full SQL WITH clause the AI must use as its base dataset. Supports {{role}}, {{currentDate}}, {{year}} template variables.

sqlForbiddenTables.description: Comma-separated table/view names the AI must never reference in SQL.

sqlRlsHintEnabled.description: When ON, the active viewer role is sent to the AI as a context hint for role-based row scoping.

authMode.description: Shared PAT: one Databricks identity for all report viewers (default). OAuth on-behalf-of: per-viewer identity via token exchange; requires proxy v2. Drives the header security badge.

connectionMode.description: Auto: proxy when Proxy URL is set, else Direct. Proxy: route through the UniBridge AI Proxy (recommended). Direct: browser calls Databricks Genie REST (dev/demo). Genie Supervisor Agent: proxy-hosted multi-space supervisor. Databricks AI Gateway: experimental MCP/Gateway route. Azure OpenAI / AWS Bedrock: route through the UniBridge AI Proxy.

enumeration.displayName: Auto — use Proxy if configured, otherwise Direct
Databricks Genie via UniBridge AI Proxy (recommended)
Genie Supervisor Agent (multi-space) via UniBridge AI Proxy
Azure OpenAI via UniBridge AI Proxy
AWS Bedrock via UniBridge AI Proxy

supervisorEndpoint.description: Supervisor mode only. Databricks Mosaic AI serving endpoint URL.

supervisorAgentName.description: Optional display label for the supervisor shown in the visual header.

supervisorSynthesisProfile.description: Profile or space ID used for proxy-side synthesis when fusing multi-space answers.

supervisorAutoFusion.description: When enabled, automatically fuses synchronized multi-space answers after all selected spaces respond.

supervisorSynthesisPrompt.description: Instructions that guide synthesis/fusion when combining multiple space answers.

useReportTheme.description: When ON, the visual inherits the Power BI report theme colours. When OFF, the DwD built-in theme is used.

themeName.description: Built-in visual theme. Select Custom to apply brand colour overrides.

multiSpaceCount.description: Number of additional Genie Spaces (1-9, primary excluded).

headerTitle.description: Optional override for the visual's internal header. Leave blank to let Power BI's standard Visual Title above the visual stand alone. Set this when the standard title is hidden and you still want a label inside the visual frame.

headerSubtitle.description: Optional secondary line shown below the Internal Header Title. Leave blank to hide.

uiScale.description: Adjust font and spacing density. Small condenses the layout for narrow visual panes; Large is friendlier for accessibility and presentation.

compactMode.description: Auto: collapse the header automatically when the visual is narrow. On: always show the compact header (icon-only chips, dropdown space selector). Off: never compact, even on narrow panes.

showSetupAccess.description: When enabled, the Connected / status capsule opens a Setup tab inside Developer Tools for author/admin configuration. Keep disabled for clutter-free consumer reports.

showHeader.description: When ON (default), the visual shows its own title row (icon + Header Title + Header Subtitle). When OFF, that block is hidden — useful when the surrounding report already provides a title. The connection status pill, toolbar, and tab strip stay visible.

headerIconStyle.description: Choose the icon shown to the left of the Header Title. 'Default' is the original chat-bubble + sparkle. Pick a different shape for brand variety, or 'None' to hide the icon while keeping the title text.
